uiBuilder.label: Quote Versions Comparison
uiBuilder.description: Combined action bar + comparison grid. Each version column needs header.sysId (the record sys_id). Action bar handles Select All, Approve, Share, Generate. All events carry sysId.

properties.name: versions
properties.label: Versions (JSON array)
properties.description: Array of version objects, one per column. Each: { header:{ sysId, option, title?, status?:{label,color}, selectable? }, sections:[{sectionName,type,fields:[{label,value,displayType,formatted,...}]}], actions:[{key,label,style}] }. header.sysId is required — it is the record sys_id carried in all emitted events.

properties.name: title
properties.label: Title
properties.description: Fallback grid title if the first version has no header.title.

properties.name: labelWidth
properties.label: Label column width
properties.description: CSS width of the left label column, e.g. 200px or 16rem.

properties.name: showActionBar
properties.label: Show action bar
properties.description: When on, renders the Select All / Approve / Share / Generate action bar above the grid.

properties.name: showCount
properties.label: Show selection count
properties.description: Show 'X of N selected' count in the action bar.

properties.name: selectAllLabel
properties.label: Select All label
properties.description: Label for the Select All button.

properties.name: deselectAllLabel
properties.label: Deselect All label
properties.description: Label shown on Select All when all options are already selected.

properties.name: approveLabel
properties.label: Approve button label
properties.description: Label for the Approve Selected button.

properties.name: shareLabel
properties.label: Share button label
properties.description: Label for the Share to Broker button.

properties.name: generateLabel
properties.label: Generate button label
properties.description: Label for the Generate New Option button.

properties.name: approveIcon
properties.label: Approve icon
properties.description: Optional now-icon name for the Approve button (e.g. circle-check-outline).

properties.name: shareIcon
properties.label: Share icon
properties.description: Optional now-icon name for the Share button.

properties.name: generateIcon
properties.label: Generate icon
properties.description: Optional now-icon name for the Generate button.

actions.name: QC2_VERSION_SELECTED
actions.label: Version selected
actions.description: Fired when a column's Select checkbox changes. Payload: { sysId, checked }.

payload.name: sysId
payload.label: Sys ID
payload.description: The header.sysId of the toggled version.

payload.name: checked
payload.label: Checked
payload.description: Whether the checkbox is now checked.

actions.name: QC2_SELECTION_CHANGED
actions.label: Selection changed
actions.description: Fired when the selection changes (individual checkbox or Select All). Payload: { selected, count }.

payload.name: selected
payload.label: Selected sys IDs
payload.description: Array of sysId strings currently selected.

actions.name: QC2_ACTION_CLICKED
actions.label: Action button clicked
actions.description: Fired when a per-version footer action button is clicked. Payload: { index, sysId, option, action }.

payload.name: index
payload.label: Column index
payload.description: Zero-based index of the version column.

payload.name: action
payload.label: Action key
payload.description: The clicked button's key or label. Branch on this.

actions.name: QC2_APPROVE_SELECTED
actions.label: Approve selected
actions.description: Fired when Approve Selected is clicked with at least one version selected. Payload: { selected }.

payload.name: selected
payload.label: Selected sys IDs
payload.description: Array of sysId strings to approve.

actions.name: QC2_SHARE_TO_BROKER
actions.label: Share to broker
actions.description: Fired when Share to Broker is clicked with at least one version selected. Payload: { selected }.

payload.name: selected
payload.label: Selected sys IDs
payload.description: Array of sysId strings to share.

actions.name: QC2_GENERATE_NEW_OPTION
actions.label: Generate new option
actions.description: Fired when Generate New Option is clicked. No payload.
